item.title: If you make a nostril sound, you have to hit the green arrow thingy. FRIDAY meme dump. (Hold on, the weekend is almost here)
item.description:
1
2. HE HE
3. "Look at those peasants below"
4
5. Just to sport refs going on a date
6. Me, a rulebraker (colorized)
7. ARE YE READY FOR THE GREAT GOOSE WAR
8. Building site manager annoyed about how bad the fence has been installed
9. Average Idiot
10. Me: "I never, get picked in sports, WTF?" Also Me:
11. Norm on Who Wants To Be A Millionaire
12. That's a lot of energy for an energy efficiency joke
13
14. How accurate is this?
15. Thanks to the 2,5 people (hi, Mom,Dad and dog) who made it to the end of this dump! When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with more chaos and a lot more questionable decisions. Here is a scene from the game I've just completed! Anyway, it would make my day if you could check out our game on Steam and give it a wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: AITA?
item.description: I was raised quaker, and despite becoming atheist I still hold to the values. I abhor violence, but I also hate bullies more. Saw some guy in a cut people off at a gas station with a line just so he could pump first. I walked over, he rolls down his window and I call him out and tell him to apologize. He tells me to get out of his face and kicks his door open at me, cutting my leg open and knocking me back. I respond by grabbing the door and p*nch him in the face, he falls back into his seat and I just ... leave? I feel disgusted with myself, even today. I know this will die in usersub, I just have to get it off my chest
item.dc:creator: PAHamster

item.title: Improvise, adapt, overcome
item.description:
Those three words are paramount to fighting and winning battles, but what happens when you finally overcome?
You keep improvising, and you keep adapting.
The enemy won’t rest and neither should you.

item.title: Paralympian…
item.description: Heartwarming moment watching French Paralympian, Kevin Piette, who has been paraplegic since an accident at age 11, makes history as he carries the Olympic flame through Paris while wearing a robotic exoskeleton.

item.title: reached my limit
item.description: beaten down by crap people, capitalism, and poor life choices. it probably won't last long this feeling...at least not how low I feel. but ffs. give a girl a fucking break. late front page edit; to everyone who's commented or voted this post today, I cannot thank you guys enough. you really have cheered me up and I know I'm not alone. I will try and get back to everybody who's commented personally just because I feel like I owe you at least a an updoot if I haven't already, x
item.dc:creator: lightfantasticem172

item.title: Good morning!
item.description:
The reverse helicopter
It's my cake day! Let's celebrate with a bigger dump! Happy Friday and have a great weekend, fellow humans and humanoids!

item.title: Delighted for her!! She's had to put up with so much hate, takes serious strength to block all that out and get the job done! Legend!

item.title: Sometimes it be like that
item.description: I'm not looking for advice, I'm not looking for the internet points, and I'm not looking for resources to help me through this. I'm going to be fine. I'm not depressed, I'm just sad. I just felt the overwhelming need to post outside of my social circle. *The phrase "self termination" is so my post doesn't get shot down.*
item.dc:creator: Patronsaintofboredom
